title: http: fix use-after-free in onHandshake when checkServerIdentity rejects (u9sf0l)
category: callback-frees-client use-after-free (onHandshake continues after the fail path frees the client)
crash_site: ASAN use-after-poison on a WRITE at src/http/HTTPContext.zig (~line 420) inside onHandshake itself: after the verification-failure branch already freed the client, onHandshake keeps writing client.flags / unregisterAbortTracker() / terminateSocket(). The free happened earlier in the same synchronous call path.

ground_truth.decoy_fn: the free path that runs first — checkServerIdentity / closeAndFail / fail / src/http.zig::onAsyncHTTPCallback -> deinit. Those are CORRECT (they are supposed to free on verification failure). The bug is onHandshake continuing to touch the client AFTER that path already freed it.
ground_truth.fix_summary: In HTTPContext.zig::onHandshake, when checkServerIdentity() returns false it synchronously runs closeAndFail()->fail()->onAsyncHTTPCallback()->threadlocal_http.deinit(), destroying the AsyncHTTP that embeds the HTTPClient. onHandshake then kept executing on the freed client — setting client.flags.did_have_handshaking_error, calling unregisterAbortTracker(), and terminateSocket() — a use-after-free. Fix: return immediately on the checkServerIdentity()==false branch, dropping those three post-free operations.

admission.note: monogram+haiku vs baseline+haiku discrimination. HARD: ASAN points at a write inside onHandshake, but the FREE is several frames deep on the verification-failure path (checkServerIdentity->closeAndFail->...->deinit) which is correct. Solver must see that onHandshake re-touches the client after that synchronous free. Live decoy = the free path itself. Authored from PR #29829 fix diff (early return after checkServerIdentity==false). NOTE: scaffold had root_cause_file=boringssl.zig — corrected to src/http/HTTPContext.zig.

provenance: https://github.com/oven-sh/bun/pull/29829 — http: fix use-after-free in onHandshake when checkServerIdentity rejects (merged 2026-04-28); fix commit fad191de5856; base 245c1e4e84ae. Root cause + fix extracted from the commit diff (onHandshake early-return; free path = onAsyncHTTPCallback->deinit).
